Nav.bookWhatsappAria: Book on WhatsApp (opens in a new tab)

HomePage.title: Rent a car, your way
HomePage.description: Browse the fleet and book in minutes. TanStack Query is wired at the root so you can load vehicles, pricing, and availability anywhere under this layout.

HowItWorks.title: Book a car in three simple steps
HowItWorks.subtitle: Tell us what you need from the hero form—we handle driver matching, pricing, and introductions so you can travel with confidence.
HowItWorks.step1Description: Fill in every field in the booking form above—your details, trip, vehicle choice, and pick-up time—then tap Send.
HowItWorks.step1Bullet1: One form captures your full trip brief
HowItWorks.step1Bullet3: No payment until options are confirmed
HowItWorks.step2Description: Your request appears on our admin dashboard. We reach out to available car providers and drivers, compare willingness to take the trip, and collect their quotes.
HowItWorks.step2Bullet1: Large network of providers and drivers
HowItWorks.step2Bullet2: We negotiate timing and price for you
HowItWorks.step3Description: We phone you with vehicle, driver, and price details. If you agree, the car provider or driver contacts you directly to finalize pickup and trip details.
HowItWorks.step3Bullet2: You choose before anyone is assigned
HowItWorks.step3Bullet3: Direct handoff when you say yes

WhyChooseUs.title: Unmatched quality and service for your journey
WhyChooseUs.feature1Body: From Noah and HiAce to sedans and local rides—pick the vehicle that fits your trip, group size, and budget.
WhyChooseUs.feature2Body: Our team handles your request, coordinates drivers, and stays reachable by phone until you are on the road.
WhyChooseUs.feature3Body: Pick-up and drop-off across the routes we serve—tell us your locations and we match you with available providers.
WhyChooseUs.feature4Body: We work with vetted car providers and drivers so you get clear pricing, verified contacts, and peace of mind.

Faq.title: Everything you need to know about our services

1.question: What do I need to rent a car?
1.answer: Browse our fleet and pick a vehicle that fits your trip. Share your pickup and drop-off locations, travel dates, and contact details in the booking form—we will confirm availability, pricing, and any documents required before you finalize.

2.question: How old do I need to be to rent a car?
2.answer: Minimum age depends on the vehicle and provider—often 21 or 25 for larger or premium cars. Send us your trip details and we will tell you exactly what applies and match you with an eligible option.

3.question: Can I rent a car with a debit card?
3.answer: Some providers accept debit cards; others require a credit card for the security deposit. Tell us your preference when you book and we will align you with a provider whose payment rules work for you.

Hero.alertText: Thank you for your query. We have received your request. We are finding the car and an available driver. We will call you soon with all the details. Please wait until then.

1.quote: Booking through Chaka Ride was effortless. The driver was on time, the car was spotless, and the whole trip felt safe from pick-up to drop-off.
1.name: Rashida Khan

2.quote: We needed a larger vehicle for a family weekend—Noah was perfect. Clear pricing over the phone and no surprises at the end. Highly recommend.
2.name: Karim Ahmed

3.quote: I use Chaka Ride for airport runs regularly. Reliable, professional, and they always confirm details before the day. Exactly what I need for work travel.
3.name: Nadia Rahman

Footer.brandBlurb: Reliable car rental and transfers—Noah, HiAce, sedans, and more. We match you with vetted drivers and clear pricing for every trip.
Footer.subscribeBlurb: Get updates on fleet offers and travel tips. No spam—unsubscribe anytime.

AboutPage.title: Your trusted ride partner in Bangladesh
AboutPage.intro: Chaka Ride connects travelers with reliable vehicles and vetted drivers across Bangladesh. Whether it is an airport transfer, a family tour, or daily commutes—we make every journey safe, comfortable, and hassle-free.
AboutPage.missionBody: We believe everyone deserves affordable, dependable transportation. Our platform bridges the gap between passengers and quality car providers—handling driver matching, pricing negotiations, and trip coordination so you can focus on the road ahead.
AboutPage.missionHighlight1: Verified drivers and vehicles for every trip
AboutPage.missionHighlight2: Transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden fees
AboutPage.missionHighlight3: Available across all 64 districts of Bangladesh
AboutPage.value1Body: Every driver and vehicle in our network is vetted. We verify documents, inspect cars, and maintain strict safety standards so you travel with confidence.
AboutPage.value2Body: No hidden fees, no surge surprises. We negotiate fair rates with providers and present clear pricing before you confirm any trip.
AboutPage.value3Body: From booking to drop-off, our team stays reachable. We listen, adapt, and go the extra mile to make your experience seamless.
AboutPage.value4Body: Based in Dhaka with deep knowledge of routes across Bangladesh. We understand traffic patterns, road conditions, and the best ways to get you there.
AboutPage.value5Body: We know your time matters. Our drivers arrive punctually, routes are planned ahead, and we keep you updated so there are no last-minute surprises.
AboutPage.value6Body: Clean, well-maintained cars with courteous drivers. Whether it is a business trip or a family outing, we make every ride feel comfortable and special.
AboutPage.ctaBody: Book your next trip in minutes. Tell us where you are going and we will handle the rest.

ContactPage.title: We would love to hear from you
ContactPage.subtitle: Have a question, need a quote, or want to partner with us? Reach out through any channel below and our team will get back to you promptly.
ContactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
ContactPage.mapSubtitle: Visit our office or get directions — we are always happy to welcome you.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

Metadata.title: Chaka Ride — Car rental
Metadata.description: Book reliable vehicles for travel, business, and leisure. Airport transfers, long-term rental, and premium fleet.

airport-pickup-drop.title: Airport Pickup & Drop
airport-pickup-drop.subtitle: Stress-free airport transfers — we track your flight, meet you on time, and get you to your destination comfortably.
airport-pickup-drop.feature1Body: We monitor your flight status in real time so we are there when you land — no waiting, no hassle.
airport-pickup-drop.feature2Body: Your driver will be waiting with a name board at the arrival gate, ready to assist with your luggage.
airport-pickup-drop.feature3Body: Know the exact price before you book. No surge pricing, no meter — just one clear fare.
airport-pickup-drop.ctaBody: Book your airport transfer now and travel stress-free.
airport-pickup-drop.whyTitle: Reliable Airport Transfers You Can Count On
airport-pickup-drop.why1Body: We track your flight so your driver is ready the moment you land — no awkward waiting at the terminal.
airport-pickup-drop.why2Body: Courteous, well-groomed drivers who know the fastest routes to and from every airport in Bangladesh.
airport-pickup-drop.why3Body: Clean, air-conditioned cars with enough space for your luggage. Travel relaxed after a long flight.
airport-pickup-drop.why4Body: Book via WhatsApp or phone in minutes. Our support team is available around the clock for any changes.
airport-pickup-drop.faq1Q: How early should I book my airport pickup?
airport-pickup-drop.faq1A: We recommend booking at least 6 hours in advance. However, we also accept last-minute bookings based on driver availability.
airport-pickup-drop.faq2Q: What if my flight is delayed?
airport-pickup-drop.faq2A: No worries — we track your flight in real time. Your driver will adjust to your actual landing time at no extra charge.
airport-pickup-drop.faq3Q: Do you provide service for all airports in Bangladesh?
airport-pickup-drop.faq3A: Yes, we cover Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport (Dhaka), Shah Amanat International Airport (Chittagong), and Osmani International Airport (Sylhet).
airport-pickup-drop.faq4Q: Is the fare fixed or metered?
airport-pickup-drop.faq4A: All airport transfer fares are fixed and confirmed before booking. There are no surge prices or hidden charges.
airport-pickup-drop.faq5Q: Can I book a round trip — both pickup and drop?
airport-pickup-drop.faq5A: Absolutely! You can book a round trip at a discounted package rate. Just mention it when you book via WhatsApp or phone.

group-tour-minibus.title: Group Tour Minibus
group-tour-minibus.subtitle: Travel together in comfort. Our minibuses are perfect for family trips, corporate outings, and group excursions.
group-tour-minibus.feature1Body: Roomy minibuses with comfortable seating for up to 15 passengers, plus space for luggage.
group-tour-minibus.feature2Body: Our drivers know every route across Bangladesh and ensure a smooth, safe journey for your group.
group-tour-minibus.feature3Body: Plan your stops your way. We adapt to your schedule — whether it is a day trip or multi-day tour.
group-tour-minibus.ctaBody: Get a quote for your group tour minibus today.
group-tour-minibus.whyTitle: The Perfect Minibus for Every Group Adventure
group-tour-minibus.why1Body: Our minibuses seat up to 15 passengers with ample legroom and luggage space for everyone.
group-tour-minibus.why2Body: Drivers who know scenic routes, rest stops, and the best roads across Bangladesh — your trip is in good hands.
group-tour-minibus.why3Body: Day trips, weekend getaways, or multi-day tours — we match your itinerary, not the other way around.
group-tour-minibus.why4Body: Split the cost among the group and it is cheaper than individual rides. Great value for family and friends.
group-tour-minibus.faqTitle: Group Tour Minibus — Your Questions Answered
group-tour-minibus.faq1Q: How many passengers can fit in a minibus?
group-tour-minibus.faq1A: Our minibuses comfortably seat 10 to 15 passengers depending on the model, with extra space for luggage.
group-tour-minibus.faq2Q: Can we customize the tour route?
group-tour-minibus.faq2A: Yes, the itinerary is fully flexible. Tell us your stops and timings, and we will plan the route accordingly.
group-tour-minibus.faq3Q: Is the driver familiar with tourist spots?
group-tour-minibus.faq3A: Our drivers are experienced with popular tourist destinations across Bangladesh and can suggest great stops along the way.
group-tour-minibus.faq4Q: What is included in the minibus rental price?
group-tour-minibus.faq4A: The price includes the driver, fuel, and tolls. Food and accommodation for multi-day trips are not included.
group-tour-minibus.faq5Q: Can we book for a multi-day tour?
group-tour-minibus.faq5A: Of course! We offer special multi-day rates. Contact us with your dates and destinations for a custom quote.

hourly-car-rental.title: Hourly Car Rental
hourly-car-rental.subtitle: Need a car for a few hours? Rent by the hour for meetings, errands, or short trips around the city.
hourly-car-rental.feature1Body: Only pay for the time you need. Flexible hourly packages starting from as low as 2 hours.
hourly-car-rental.feature2Body: Choose from sedans, SUVs, and premium cars — all clean, well-maintained, and ready to go.
hourly-car-rental.feature3Body: Every hourly rental comes with a professional driver so you can focus on your work.
hourly-car-rental.ctaTitle: Need a car for a few hours?
hourly-car-rental.ctaBody: Book your hourly rental and save on full-day costs.
hourly-car-rental.whyTitle: Flexible Hourly Car Rental for Your Daily Needs
hourly-car-rental.why1Body: Pay only for the hours you need. Perfect for city errands, quick meetings, or short business trips.
hourly-car-rental.why2Body: Experienced, polite, and familiar with city routes — our drivers make every short trip safe and hassle-free.
hourly-car-rental.why3Body: Our hourly rental ensures on-time pickups and drop-offs, so you can stick to your schedule without stress.
hourly-car-rental.why4Body: Reserve your car online or by phone quickly, and get friendly assistance anytime during your rental.
hourly-car-rental.faq1Q: What is the minimum booking duration?
hourly-car-rental.faq1A: The minimum booking is 2 hours. After that, you can extend in 1-hour increments.
hourly-car-rental.faq2Q: Can I extend my booking if I need more time?
hourly-car-rental.faq2A: Yes, just let us know and we will extend your rental seamlessly. Extra hours are billed at the same hourly rate.
hourly-car-rental.faq3Q: What types of cars are available for hourly rental?
hourly-car-rental.faq3A: We offer sedans, SUVs, and premium cars. You can choose based on your preference and budget.
hourly-car-rental.faq4Q: Is a driver included in the hourly rental?
hourly-car-rental.faq4A: Yes, every hourly rental comes with a professional driver. Self-drive options are not available at this time.
hourly-car-rental.faq5Q: How is the hourly fare calculated?
hourly-car-rental.faq5A: The fare is based on the number of hours booked plus the car type. We share the exact amount before you confirm.

daily-car-rental.title: Daily Car Rental
daily-car-rental.subtitle: Rent a car for the day with a dedicated driver. Perfect for sightseeing, business visits, or personal errands.
daily-car-rental.feature1Body: Your car and driver are available for the entire day — go wherever you need, whenever you need.
daily-car-rental.feature2Body: From economy sedans to premium rides, pick the car that fits your style and budget.
daily-car-rental.feature3Body: Fuel, driver, and tolls are included. One price, no surprises at the end of the day.
daily-car-rental.ctaTitle: Need a car for the day?
daily-car-rental.ctaBody: Book your daily rental and enjoy hassle-free travel.
daily-car-rental.whyTitle: A Full Day of Freedom with Your Own Car & Driver
daily-car-rental.why1Body: From morning to night, the car and driver are exclusively yours. Go wherever the day takes you.
daily-car-rental.why2Body: Economy sedans, SUVs, or premium rides — pick the vehicle that matches your style and budget.
daily-car-rental.why3Body: Fuel, tolls, and driver fee are all included in one transparent price. No surprise charges at the end.
daily-car-rental.why4Body: Sightseeing, business visits, personal errands — our daily rental fits every kind of day plan.
daily-car-rental.faqTitle: Daily Car Rental — What You Need to Know
daily-car-rental.faq1A: A full day typically means 10-12 hours of availability. If you need the car longer, just let us know in advance.
daily-car-rental.faq2A: Yes, fuel, driver charges, and tolls within the city are all included in the daily rate. No surprise bills.
daily-car-rental.faq3Q: Can I use the car for outstation trips?
daily-car-rental.faq3A: Yes! Outstation daily rentals are available with slightly adjusted pricing. Contact us for a quote based on your destination.
daily-car-rental.faq4Q: What happens if I need the car for multiple days?
daily-car-rental.faq4A: Multi-day bookings get a discounted rate. It is more cost-effective than booking individual days separately.
daily-car-rental.faq5Q: Can I choose a specific car model?
daily-car-rental.faq5A: Yes, you can request a specific model based on availability. We will confirm it before your booking is finalized.

monthly-car-rental.title: Monthly Car Rental
monthly-car-rental.subtitle: Long-term rental made easy. Get a dedicated car and driver for the entire month at a special rate.
monthly-car-rental.feature1Body: Monthly plans offer the lowest per-day rates. Save significantly compared to daily bookings.
monthly-car-rental.feature2Body: The same car and driver every day — no switching, no delays. Like having your own personal car.
monthly-car-rental.feature3Body: Extend or modify your plan as needed. We work with your schedule, not against it.
monthly-car-rental.ctaTitle: Need a car for the month?
monthly-car-rental.ctaBody: Get our best monthly rates and enjoy consistent service.
monthly-car-rental.whyTitle: Your Own Dedicated Car for the Entire Month
monthly-car-rental.why1Body: Monthly plans offer the best value. Save significantly compared to booking daily or using ride-sharing apps.
monthly-car-rental.why2Body: No switching vehicles or getting used to new drivers. Enjoy the consistency of your own dedicated setup.
monthly-car-rental.why3Body: Need to extend, pause, or modify? We work around your schedule. No rigid long-term lock-ins.
monthly-car-rental.why4Body: Whether for office commute or personal use, we offer tailored packages for individuals and companies.
monthly-car-rental.faqTitle: Monthly Car Rental — All Your Doubts Cleared
monthly-car-rental.faq1Q: How much can I save with a monthly plan?
monthly-car-rental.faq1A: Monthly plans save 30-40% compared to daily bookings over the same period. The longer you rent, the more you save.
monthly-car-rental.faq2Q: Will I get the same driver every day?
monthly-car-rental.faq2A: Yes, we assign a dedicated driver for your entire month. If the driver is unavailable on any day, we arrange a qualified backup.
monthly-car-rental.faq3Q: Can I cancel or modify my monthly plan?
monthly-car-rental.faq3A: Yes, you can modify or cancel with 7 days notice. We believe in flexible terms, not rigid contracts.
monthly-car-rental.faq4A: Monthly plans come with a generous daily kilometer allowance. Extra kilometers are billed at a very reasonable per-km rate.
monthly-car-rental.faq5Q: Do you offer corporate monthly plans?
monthly-car-rental.faq5A: Yes, we have special corporate packages for businesses that need multiple vehicles. Contact us for a tailored quote.

wedding-car-rental.title: Wedding Car Rental
wedding-car-rental.subtitle: Make your special day even more memorable with our elegant wedding car service — decorated and ready for the occasion.
wedding-car-rental.feature1Body: Beautifully decorated vehicles that match your wedding theme and add a touch of elegance.
wedding-car-rental.feature2Body: Choose from our finest sedans and luxury cars for the bride, groom, and wedding guests.
wedding-car-rental.feature3Body: Weddings run on a tight schedule. We arrive early and ensure every transition is smooth.
wedding-car-rental.ctaBody: Book our wedding car service and ride in style.
wedding-car-rental.whyTitle: Make Your Special Day Truly Unforgettable
wedding-car-rental.why1Body: Flowers, ribbons, and elegant decor matched to your wedding theme. Your car will look as special as the day.
wedding-car-rental.why2Body: Choose from our finest sedans and luxury vehicles for the bride, groom, and entire wedding party.
wedding-car-rental.why3Body: Weddings have tight timelines. Our drivers arrive early and stay ready for every part of the ceremony.
wedding-car-rental.why4Body: Multiple cars for the baraat, guest transport, and reception. We handle the full wedding logistics for you.
wedding-car-rental.faqTitle: Wedding Car Rental — Plan Your Perfect Ride
wedding-car-rental.faq1Q: How early should I book for a wedding?
wedding-car-rental.faq1A: We recommend booking at least 2 weeks in advance, especially during wedding season (November-February) when demand is highest.
wedding-car-rental.faq2Q: Can you decorate the car to match our wedding theme?
wedding-car-rental.faq2A: Yes! We offer custom decoration with flowers, ribbons, and ornaments. Share your theme and we will match it beautifully.
wedding-car-rental.faq3Q: How many cars can I book for the wedding?
wedding-car-rental.faq3A: As many as you need — from a single bridal car to a full fleet for the baraat and guest transport.
wedding-car-rental.faq4Q: What car models do you have for weddings?
wedding-car-rental.faq4A: We offer premium sedans, SUVs, and luxury vehicles. Popular choices include Toyota Noah, Premio, and premium sedans.
wedding-car-rental.faq5Q: What if the wedding schedule changes last minute?
wedding-car-rental.faq5A: Our drivers arrive early and stay flexible. If timings shift, just let us know and we will adjust on the spot.

office-pick-and-drop.title: Office Pick & Drop
office-pick-and-drop.subtitle: Daily commute sorted. We pick you up from home and drop you at the office — and back — every working day.
office-pick-and-drop.feature1Body: Set your pickup and drop-off times once. We handle the rest, every single day — rain or shine.
office-pick-and-drop.feature2Body: Monthly office commute packages that cost less than ride-hailing apps over the same period.
office-pick-and-drop.feature3Body: Our drivers know that office hours are non-negotiable. You will never be late because of us.
office-pick-and-drop.ctaTitle: Tired of the daily commute hassle?
office-pick-and-drop.ctaBody: Set up your office pick and drop service today.
office-pick-and-drop.whyTitle: Say Goodbye to Daily Commute Stress
office-pick-and-drop.why1Body: Tell us your pickup time and office address once. We show up every working day like clockwork.
office-pick-and-drop.why2Body: Our monthly commute packages cost less than using ride-sharing apps daily. Do the math — you will save.
office-pick-and-drop.why3Body: Our drivers understand that office hours are non-negotiable. Punctuality is built into our service DNA.
office-pick-and-drop.why4Body: Start your day relaxed in a clean, air-conditioned car instead of battling crowded public transport.
office-pick-and-drop.faqTitle: Office Pick & Drop — Everything You Want to Know
office-pick-and-drop.faq1Q: How does the monthly office commute package work?
office-pick-and-drop.faq1A: You tell us your home address, office address, and preferred pickup times. We assign a dedicated driver who comes every working day.
office-pick-and-drop.faq2Q: What if I have a day off or skip a day?
office-pick-and-drop.faq2A: Just inform us the evening before. Skipped days can be adjusted in your billing. No penalty for occasional off days.
office-pick-and-drop.faq3Q: Can the route include a stop — like dropping kids at school?
office-pick-and-drop.faq3A: Yes, we can add one or two regular stops to your route. We will factor them into the timing and pricing.
office-pick-and-drop.faq4Q: Is this cheaper than using Uber or Pathao daily?
office-pick-and-drop.faq4A: Yes, significantly. Our monthly packages are designed to beat daily ride-hailing costs while offering better consistency.
office-pick-and-drop.faq5Q: What kind of cars are used for office commute?
office-pick-and-drop.faq5A: We typically assign clean, well-maintained sedans. You can upgrade to a premium vehicle for a small additional charge.

emergency-drop.title: Emergency Drop
emergency-drop.subtitle: Urgent travel needs? We dispatch a car to you as fast as possible — available around the clock.
emergency-drop.feature1Body: We prioritize emergency requests and dispatch the nearest available driver to your location immediately.
emergency-drop.feature2Body: Emergencies do not wait for office hours. Our team is ready to help you any time, day or night.
emergency-drop.feature3Body: Experienced drivers who know the fastest routes. We get you where you need to be quickly and safely.
emergency-drop.ctaBody: Call or message us now for immediate assistance.
emergency-drop.whyTitle: When Every Minute Counts, We Are There
emergency-drop.why1Body: We dispatch the nearest available driver the moment you call. No long wait, no booking queues.
emergency-drop.why2Body: Midnight, holidays, bad weather — emergencies do not wait and neither do we. Always on standby.
emergency-drop.why3Body: Our emergency drivers know the quickest routes and stay calm under pressure to get you there safely.
emergency-drop.why4Title: One Call Is All It Takes
emergency-drop.why4Body: Call or WhatsApp us. We confirm a driver within minutes and keep you updated until arrival.
emergency-drop.faq1Q: How fast can you send a car?
emergency-drop.faq1A: In most areas of Dhaka, we can dispatch a car within 15-30 minutes. Response time varies by location and time of day.
emergency-drop.faq2Q: Is emergency drop available outside Dhaka?
emergency-drop.faq2A: Yes, we cover major cities and highways across Bangladesh. Availability in remote areas depends on driver proximity.
emergency-drop.faq3Q: Is there an extra charge for emergency bookings?
emergency-drop.faq3A: There is a small urgency fee for immediate dispatch, but we keep it reasonable. The exact fare is shared before confirmation.
emergency-drop.faq4Q: Can I book an emergency drop for someone else?
emergency-drop.faq4A: Absolutely. Give us the pickup location and the passenger details. We will coordinate directly with them.
emergency-drop.faq5Q: What if I need to go to a hospital urgently?
emergency-drop.faq5A: Medical emergencies are our top priority. Let us know it is urgent and we will fast-track the nearest available driver to you.

SedanPremiumPage.title: Premium Sedan
SedanPremiumPage.subtitle: Experience luxury and comfort on every ride. Our premium sedans are the perfect choice for business trips, airport transfers, and special occasions.
SedanPremiumPage.gallerySubtitle: Browse through our premium sedan collection — sleek design, spotless interiors, and ready for your next ride.
SedanPremiumPage.feature1Body: Plush leather seats with ample legroom. Whether it is a 20-minute city ride or a 4-hour highway trip, you will arrive relaxed.
SedanPremiumPage.feature2Body: Well-groomed, courteous drivers who know the roads. They arrive on time, drive safely, and make your journey stress-free.
SedanPremiumPage.feature3Body: First impressions matter. Our premium sedans are ideal for airport pickups, client meetings, and executive travel.
SedanPremiumPage.feature4Body: Every car is thoroughly cleaned and inspected before each trip. You get a fresh, well-maintained vehicle every time.
SedanPremiumPage.ctaBody: Book a premium sedan now — perfect for business, travel, or any special occasion.

SedanEconomyPage.title: Economy Sedan
SedanEconomyPage.subtitle: Smart, affordable, and reliable. Our economy sedans give you a comfortable ride without breaking the bank — perfect for daily commutes and city travel.
SedanEconomyPage.gallerySubtitle: Clean, comfortable, and ready to go — browse through our economy sedan collection.
SedanEconomyPage.feature1Body: Get the best value for your money. Our economy sedans offer competitive pricing without compromising on comfort or safety.
SedanEconomyPage.feature2Body: CNG and fuel-efficient engines keep running costs low, which means more savings passed on to you.
SedanEconomyPage.feature3Body: Compact enough to navigate Dhaka traffic with ease, yet spacious inside for a comfortable ride.
SedanEconomyPage.feature4Body: Every economy sedan is regularly serviced and cleaned. You always get a dependable, fresh vehicle.
SedanEconomyPage.ctaBody: Book an economy sedan now — comfort and value for everyday travel.

NoahPage.title: Toyota Noah
NoahPage.subtitle: The ultimate family and group travel companion. Our Toyota Noah offers spacious seating, smooth ride quality, and all the room you need for luggage and passengers.
NoahPage.gallerySubtitle: Spacious, stylish, and built for comfort — explore our Toyota Noah collection.
NoahPage.feature1Body: Generous cabin space with flexible seating for up to 8 passengers. Perfect for family trips, group tours, and airport runs with lots of luggage.
NoahPage.feature2Body: Power sliding doors make getting in and out effortless, especially in tight parking spaces. Great for elderly passengers and kids.
NoahPage.feature3Body: Toyota's refined suspension and sound insulation deliver a smooth, quiet highway experience — even on long-distance routes.
NoahPage.feature4Body: Rear AC vents, USB charging ports, and flat-folding seats for extra luggage space. Everything a family needs on the road.
NoahPage.ctaTitle: Travelling with family or a group?
NoahPage.ctaBody: Book a Toyota Noah now — room for everyone, comfort for every mile.

HiacePage.title: Toyota Hiace
HiacePage.subtitle: The go-to choice for large groups, corporate shuttles, and long-distance tours. Our Toyota Hiace offers unmatched space, durability, and comfort for up to 14 passengers.
HiacePage.gallerySubtitle: Built for big groups and long roads — explore our Toyota Hiace collection.
HiacePage.feature1Body: Comfortably seats 10 to 14 passengers with generous legroom. Ideal for group tours, office pick-and-drop, and large family outings.
HiacePage.feature2Body: Toyota Hiace is legendary for highway reliability. Smooth ride, powerful engine, and excellent fuel efficiency on long routes.
HiacePage.feature3Body: Huge cargo area at the rear for suitcases, tour gear, and equipment. No need to worry about fitting everything in.
HiacePage.feature4Body: Robust build quality, well-maintained brakes, and experienced drivers ensure every trip is safe and on time.
HiacePage.ctaBody: Book a Toyota Hiace now — space for the whole team, comfort for the whole journey.
